verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Nations are breaking, Israel's awaking, The signs that the prophets foretold; The Gentile days numbered, With horrors encumbered; Eternity soon will unfold.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The day of redemption is here, Men's hearts are failing for fear; Be filled with the Spirit, Your lamps trimmed and clear, Look up! Your redemption is here.

verse.name: v3
v4
verse.lines: Heaven's powers are shaking, And many are mistaking God's meaning to be of the sky; God's Church is the power That's shaking this hour: The day of redemption is nigh.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: False prophets are lying, God's Truth they're denying, That Jesus the Christ is our God; Though this generation Spurns God's revelation, We'll walk where the apostles have trod.
